name: Rigakafin Ciwon Jiki (H -- MARCH)
description: Combat hypothermia shine babban kisa da za a iya hana shi a cikin rauni. Triad mai mutuwa: hypothermia + acidosis + coagulopathy. Hana a kowane farashi.
steps: Cire duk rigar rigar da zaran ta dace.
Rufe majiyyaci da bargo mai nuna zafi (sarari) -- gefen mai sheki IN wajen majiyyaci.
Kunna kai da wuya (garin asarar zafi mai mahimmanci).
Cire daga ƙasa - sanya wani abu tsakanin ƙasa mai haƙuri da sanyi.
Gudanar da ruwan dumi na IV idan akwai.
Kada ka ƙyale majiyyaci ya yi rawar jiki ba tare da rufewa ba --girgiza alama ce ta faɗakarwa da wuri.
Kula da zafin jiki idan akwai ma'aunin zafi da sanyio. Kasa da 35°C (95°F) = hypothermia.
warnings: Hypothermia yana kara tsananta coagulopathy -- marasa lafiya na zubar da jini suna yin sanyi da sauri kuma suna zubar da jini sosai.
Dole ne a fara rigakafin hypothermia a filin rauni, ba a CCP ba.
